features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
48h effective anti-perspirant protection and gentle NIVEA care
description: Ingredients Butane, Aqua, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Dicaprylyl Ether, Butyloctanoic Acid, Persea Gratissima Oil, Cetyl PEG/PPG-10/1 Dimethicone, Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate, Phenoxyethanol, Polysorbate 65, Benzoic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Coumarin, Parfum Directions Directions: Shake well before use. Hold can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed. Safety Warning No Signal Word: Flame. Danger: Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Empty can before recycling. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Keep out of reach of children. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly. See more
